display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of beautiful Swedish models - a Saab 96L and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: Hear about the appalling evolution of Auschwitz. Discover the fate of many of the SS and prisoners of the camp in the last days of World War II.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Germany is losing the war but Hitler refuses surrender, instead he pursues a policy of Total War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce visits Lincoln Cathedral, where objects brought to be valued include a set of surgeon's tools from the 1860s.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie gets stuck in the mud in Woodseaves Cutting and explores the charming canal-side village of Kinver in Staffordshire.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie navigates the mighty River Severn and takes an unexpected bath as he takes a tumble at the Tardebigge lock flight in Worcestershire.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Another of Ronnie Barker's array of classic comedy characters. The inimitable Fletch has to help Lennie out after he gets involved in a fight a week before his parole.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie Smith is a man who leads two lives - one as the self-styled Che Guevara of Tooting, and the other pushing back the tide of domesticity.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Shirley invites Wolfie round to finally meet her parents. Predictably, Dad takes an instant dislike to the young Smith.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A series of head-turning supercharged cars head to the Mathewson's auction room. Plus, going under Derek's hammer - a Ford Escort XR3 and a beautiful MGA.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads out to pick up a pair of beautiful Swedish models - a Saab 96L and a Volvo P1800ES. Plus, a rare British AC Aceca comes up for sale.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave finds a very rare 70s Sunbeam Lotus that has been rotting away in a farmyard for 29 years, while a Morris Minor convertible goes under the hammer.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien realise profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast-iron fire guard and some old wooden workshop clamps.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley explains our macabre fixation with killing. Hear how real-life crimes in the early 1800s gave society a thirst for murder.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea helps artist Tasia and stone-carver Alex turn their crafty hobbies into money-making businesses.

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea helps digital embroider David and novice woodworker Rachael turn their crafty hobbies into money-making businesses.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus track down a 1980s Austin Metro. It's cheap, it's clean and it's bright yellow - and they have high hopes to treble their money.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want to buy an MGB roadster but the cheaper GT version is the one they find. It's got a few rust patches, and back in the workshop they realise beauty is skin deep.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus want to buy a BMW, and Will says he likes the 'feminine' Z3. There's a trade-in up the road which might fit the bill, but it's a high price.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will go for the once-maligned Austin Maestro. The car they want to buy has already been sold but the seller has another - his own - on the driveway. Can they do a deal.

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Another of Ronnie Barker's array of classic comedy characters. The inimitable Fletch has to help Lennie out after he gets involved in a fight a week before his parole.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie Smith is a man who leads two lives - one as the self-styled Che Guevara of Tooting, and the other pushing back the tide of domesticity.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Shirley invites Wolfie round to finally meet her parents. Predictably, Dad takes an instant dislike to the young Smith.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie begins a new canal adventure in Wales and encounters towering aqueducts and stunning scenery along the way.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie's journey on the Llangollen Canal takes an unexpected turn when his boat gets stuck in silt and a passing hire boat comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie Cumming navigates the scenic Oxford Canal onboard Naughty Lass, explores its twists and turns, and helps tow a stranded broken-down boater.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon finds out about battles in Sri Lanka, then moves on to Bangladesh, where he hears about the fast-growing industry providing prawns for the West.

programme.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Indonesia to Australia, visiting the epicentre of the 2004 tsunami, investigating the trade in illegal pets and meeting a crocodile hunter.

programme.title: Equator with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Author and broadcaster Simon Reeve travels around the equator, beginning by visiting African countries including Gabon and Kenya.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: This week tells the tale of the two Mercs, but what will the moral of the story be? Plus, the team get stuck into a moddable favourite - a 2006 Ford Fiesta ST.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek checks out an abandoned 1985 Renault 4 and an MGB Roadster that hasn't seen the light of day for 36 years, and Jack heads to Rotherham to pick up a pair of rar.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A CBD80 battery-powered loco needs to be hauled 20 miles from a factory in Burton-on-Trent to the heritage Chasewater Railway in Staffordshire.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek brings a small army of military hardware to Thornton le Dale including a Studebaker Weasel tracked vehicle and a WWII-era Willys Jeep.

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve embarks on the third leg of his four-part journey around the Mediterranean, travelling through Libya, Tunisia and across the sea to Sicily.

programme.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve embarks on the final leg of his journey around the Mediterranean, travelling from Morocco, across the sea to Spain, and on to Corsica and the French Riviera.

programme.title: Tropic of Capricorn with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve embarks on a quest to circumnavigate the globe, tracing the path of the southern tropic. The first leg sees him cross Namibia and Botswana.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues. To Mrs Boswell's horror, Billy and Julie have their baby christened in a Protestant church.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Eighties Liverpool is our destination for the family sitcom from 'Butterflies' writer Carla Lane. Grandad receives a valuable gift from Jack and Adrian on his birthday.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A visit to the Liverpool family trying to make ends meet, even if that means the odd brush with the law. Adrian undergoes a character change.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's other Liverpudlian sitcom, a follow-up to the hugely successful 'Liver Birds'. Mrs Boswell meets Lilo Lill, Joey meets Roxy and Adrian buys something really stupid.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Popular 80s sitcom about the Liverpool family doing what they can to make ends meet. Aveline is taken to hospital and Adrian has an encounter with an overpowering woman.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues trying to make ends meet in the 80s of high unemployment. Aveline has a bad catwalk experience.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues. To Mrs Boswell's horror, Billy and Julie have their baby christened in a Protestant church.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Eighties Liverpool is our destination for the family sitcom from 'Butterflies' writer Carla Lane. Grandad receives a valuable gift from Jack and Adrian on his birthday.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A visit to the Liverpool family trying to make ends meet, even if that means the odd brush with the law. Adrian undergoes a character change.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's other Liverpudlian sitcom, a follow-up to the hugely successful 'Liver Birds'. Mrs Boswell meets Lilo Lill, Joey meets Roxy and Adrian buys something really stupid.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Popular 80s sitcom about the Liverpool family doing what they can to make ends meet. Aveline is taken to hospital and Adrian has an encounter with an overpowering woman.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues trying to make ends meet in the 80s of high unemployment. Aveline has a bad catwalk experience.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues. To Mrs Boswell's horror, Billy and Julie have their baby christened in a Protestant church.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Eighties Liverpool is our destination for the family sitcom from 'Butterflies' writer Carla Lane. Grandad receives a valuable gift from Jack and Adrian on his birthday.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A visit to the Liverpool family trying to make ends meet, even if that means the odd brush with the law. Adrian undergoes a character change.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's other Liverpudlian sitcom, a follow-up to the hugely successful 'Liver Birds'. Mrs Boswell meets Lilo Lill, Joey meets Roxy and Adrian buys something really stupid.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Popular 80s sitcom about the Liverpool family doing what they can to make ends meet. Aveline is taken to hospital and Adrian has an encounter with an overpowering woman.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues trying to make ends meet in the 80s of high unemployment. Aveline has a bad catwalk experience.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Carla Lane's Liverpudlian sitcom about the Boswells, a family of loveable rogues. To Mrs Boswell's horror, Billy and Julie have their baby christened in a Protestant church.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: Eighties Liverpool is our destination for the family sitcom from 'Butterflies' writer Carla Lane. Grandad receives a valuable gift from Jack and Adrian on his birthday.

programme.title: Bread
programme.desc: A visit to the Liverpool family trying to make ends meet, even if that means the odd brush with the law. Adrian undergoes a character change.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Agdam, a city in Azerbaijan raised to the ground in a conflict decided by a new weapon of war.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring an industrial ruin in the Florida Everglades that once competed in the greatest race humankind has ever witnessed.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring traces of a mass deception hidden at Ponte Dirillo in Italy, as well as a once-lavish theatre in Ohio and an ancient city with a poisonous secret.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a dense forest near the Czech capital of Prague that hides Houska Castle, an eerie castle rumoured to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring Agdam, a city in Azerbaijan raised to the ground in a conflict decided by a new weapon of war.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring an industrial ruin in the Florida Everglades that once competed in the greatest race humankind has ever witnessed.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring traces of a mass deception hidden at Ponte Dirillo in Italy, as well as a once-lavish theatre in Ohio and an ancient city with a poisonous secret.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Exploring a dense forest near the Czech capital of Prague that hides Houska Castle, an eerie castle rumoured to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: First-class comedy and variety with one of Britain's finest double acts, Ronnies Barker and Corbett. The sketches include Cafe Hold Up, Money, Allotment, and Clock Shop.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Join Ronnies Barker and Corbett for more sparkling comedy from the 1980s, featuring classics like Nothing's Too Much Trouble and Star Flaws.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Join the much-missed kings of comedy, Ronnie Barker and Ronnie Corbett, with a special Christmas programme of spoofs, sketches and songs from 1980.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Inspired farce from Barker and Corbett, including the graduates' river picnic and the men whose names are derived from where they were conceived.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Timeless comedy with the bifocal duo. Sketches include Pismonounciation, Short-sighted Daughter and Band of Slaves.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: First-class comedy and variety with one of Britain's finest double acts, Ronnies Barker and Corbett. The sketches include Cafe Hold Up, Money, Allotment, and Clock Shop.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Join Ronnies Barker and Corbett for more sparkling comedy from the 1980s, featuring classics like Nothing's Too Much Trouble and Star Flaws.

programme.title: Louis Vuitton 38th America's Cup
programme.desc: Live coverage of the first day of racing on Sardina’s Bay of Angels for the Louis Vuitton 38th America's Cup Preliminary Regatta.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Fishing and Adventure
programme.desc: The crew head to the northern Hauraki Gulf to take on Little Barrier Island. They get into a solid squid session before tackling the rest of the challenge list from both above and below the water.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: The Timata Method offers farmers a low-cost alternative to native regeneration; A Lighter Touch uses non-chemical methods to control weeds in crops; and truffle tourism is being developed in Waikato.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A former world-champion shearer mentors the next generation of shepherds, shearers and farmers, while managing a large Pāmu-owned King Country sheep & beef station.

programme.title: Dog Squad Puppy School
programme.desc: Does Police pup Stark bite off more than she can chew, which of the Blind Low Vision brothers gets blindsided, Aiden or Archie? And a new batch of Biosecurity Beagles. S4 E5

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Find My Country House Canada
programme.desc: Couples looking to relocate from the city find their perfect country house in a regional, Canadian location.

programme.title: John & Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: Join John and Lisa as they make four mouth-watering dishes - including John's pink spaghetti and moreish fuss-free banana doughnuts - with only five main ingredients.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Hong Kong Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeremy invites good friend and TV presenter Chris Bavin to Hong Kong as they explore regenerative farming and tour the city's last traditional roasting pits.

programme.title: Johnny Vegas' Little Shop Of Antiques
programme.desc: Season Finale: Johnny must buy wisely when he visits a high-end trade fair in Harrogate. With the lease on the pop-up shop coming to an end, Johnny and Bev ponder their future in the antiques trade.

programme.title: The Travelling Auctioneers
programme.desc: Research, restore and ready for sale! An intrepid team of antiques experts and master crafters help families turn unwanted items into winning lots.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Adil Ray in which three pairs of contestants use their powers of deduction to work out words that appear in the Lingo grids and Puzzlewords.

programme.title: Hard Quiz
programme.desc: Tom Gleeson is back with four new experts vying to be #HardQuiz champion and take home the Big Brass Mug. Tonight’s topics: HMAS Melbourne, Justin Bieber, Socceroos and Jim Henson.

programme.title: The Chase New Zealand
programme.desc: Season Finale: Reagan, Tim, Raiha and Laura work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, an international quiz genius. Hosted by Paul Henry.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent
programme.desc: The auditions make their way to Birmingham, where guest judge Stacey Solomon joins the panel as performers try to impress the crowd and judges in the legendary Hippodrome theatre.

programme.title: Lotto
programme.desc: Takashi Sorimachi stars as Satoru Tachibana, an advertising firm employee slaving away under a younger boss for a meager salary. With a pachinko habit, no savings, and no prospects of romance since his divorce, Tachibana is left wondering what the future holds for him. One day, he desperately enters a lottery, trying to make enough money to pay for his child support, but his sense of self-disgust

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent Continued
programme.desc: The auditions make their way to Birmingham, where guest judge Stacey Solomon joins the panel as performers try to impress the crowd and judges in the legendary Hippodrome theatre.

programme.title: The Marlow Murder Club
programme.desc: Season Premiere: When the Mayor dies in the middle of a meeting, Judith, Becks and Suzie uncover lies, scandal and blackmail. S3 E1

programme.title: Moving Houses
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Mark and Anthony expand their Nevis Valley retreat, but their mover has to navigate the South Island's most scenic yet treacherous route, with hairpin bends and steep drop-offs.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 2008. After a breakdown, Niall learns that Ruben has returned. Obsession takes hold, and a charged confrontation forces the brothers to face their fractured past. S1 E4

programme.title: Highway Cops
programme.desc: The squeaky wheel doesn’t get the oil and ignoring it causes a rush-hour crash. Officers check out a driver who’s speeding to check-in.

programme.title: Louis Vuitton 38th America's Cup
programme.desc: Live coverage of the second day of racing on Sardina’s Bay of Angels for the Louis Vuitton 38th America's Cup Preliminary Regatta.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Rural Delivery
programme.desc: Producing fruit without trees, vines or bushes; the 20 year-long process to secure water supply for the Waimea Plain; and an award winning Waikato cheese maker caring for community and environment.

programme.title: Barkley Manor
programme.desc: There’s a battle for the ball between best friends Kahu and Floyd. Zoya the Black Russian stages a daring raid on her kitchen, and Sarah’s schnoodle Billy receives some scary news. S1 E3

programme.title: Tagata Pasifika
programme.desc: Tagata Pasifika is TVNZ's flagship Pacific news show, telling the stories of Pacific Islanders and its community. Made with the support of NZ on Air.

programme.title: Songs Of Praise
programme.desc: Inspiring hymns and songs, together with uplifting stories of faith from around the UK and beyond.

programme.title: Ainsley's Great Garden Cook Off
programme.desc: National treasure Ainsley Harriott challenges some of Britain's best chefs to make inspiring meals from ingredients available in and around a stunning selection of National Trust properties.

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Border Patrol
programme.desc: Friendly or phoney? Customs uncover suspicious paperwork in the luggage of a New Zealand resident. A traveller from China tries to convince Immigration that she’s a genuine tourist.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off Extra Slice
programme.desc: Tom Davis, Amy Gledhill and Scarlette Douglas enjoy an egg-stra dollop of Meringue Week with Jo and Tom. Who suffered soufflé dismay? And whose stiff peaks impressed this week?

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Constable Roberts investigates the death of an old friend, defying local police who rule it accidental. Meanwhile, Murdoch's son Harry moves in, but it's a tight fit.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch pursues Terrence Meyers who is suspected of murder and committing treason. Watts tracks down a man's neighbour who vanished while making a chocolate treat.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: Patrick is kidnapped, but as Teresa and the team search for clues to the abductor's identity, they realise he had numerous enemies, any one of whom might be responsible.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a murder appears to mimic an infamous crime spree from the past, Charlie and Rex rush to stop the culprit from continuing a serial killer's legacy.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing clergyman uncovers secrets, hypocrisy and murder at Miss Rosewood's Finishing School for young ladies.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Poppy Montgomery stars in the crime drama series. When Carrie receives a call from a killer telling her of his plans, the case takes a personal and chilling twist.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the sleuth on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman's aunt Mary comes to visit but witnesses the murder of a tourist. Wendy Craig guests.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Now You See Him, Now You Don't: A blind actor is the only witness to her husband's murder, but questions arise over whether she should be trusted or not.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: When an Indigenous woman has her baby taken by a social worker, Sabrina and Vince uncover a web of lies and race against time to find a newborn before she disappears forever.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The sleuthing clergyman uncovers secrets, hypocrisy and murder at Miss Rosewood's Finishing School for young ladies.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the sleuth on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman's aunt Mary comes to visit but witnesses the murder of a tourist. Wendy Craig guests.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a murder appears to mimic an infamous crime spree from the past, Charlie and Rex rush to stop the culprit from continuing a serial killer's legacy.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Constable Roberts investigates the death of an old friend, defying local police who rule it accidental. Meanwhile, Murdoch's son Harry moves in, but it's a tight fit.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch pursues Terrence Meyers who is suspected of murder and committing treason. Watts tracks down a man's neighbour who vanished while making a chocolate treat.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden investigate suspicious deaths in Kingston Penitentiary, while Brackenreid deals with a telephone operator strike. Includes outdated language.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Ogden are named as accomplices when Terrence Meyers faces charges of treason.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Dr Julia Ogden and Effie try to untangle the death of hair salon owner that occurred outside Murdoch's jurisdiction.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: Eliza finds the heir to an unclaimed fortune and needs Duke's help, but the revelation about his personal life makes working together impossible.

programme.title: Miss Scarlet and the Duke
programme.desc: Eliza receives a bomb in the morning post and must team up with Duke, Moses and her old enemy Patrick Nash to find out who is behind the deadly delivery.

programme.title: Inspector George Gently
programme.desc: The 1960s come to Northumberland in the superb mystery series starring Martin Shaw. Gently faces racism when a girl is murdered at a Northern Soul night.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric from the mind of GK Chesterton. A fugitive takes sanctuary in St Mary's and asks Father Brown for help.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A mystery for Mark Williams as the sleuthing cleric. Brown investigates the death of a director when the filming of Demon Brides comes to Kembleford.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Sid falls for the heiress to a local brewery, only for her to be arrested for the murder of her father.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown investigates the poisoning of a former hangman, while romance is in the air for Mrs McCarthy.

programme.title: Saint-Pierre
programme.desc: When an archaeologist winds up dead in her dig site, Arch and Fitz look into a group of academics she was teaching to find the murderer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: As the team rushes to save a hostage from an anonymous abductor, they rely on the only witness to her kidnapping: a non-verbal autistic child.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: When an Indigenous woman has her baby taken by a social worker, Sabrina and Vince uncover a web of lies and race against time to find a newborn before she disappears forever.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Jack Mooney is tested when a billionaire's fiancee falls from a balcony the day before her lavish wedding. It looks like suicide - except for one thing.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team enter the high-stakes world of poker when a finalist is poisoned during the Caribbean Masters tournament and the only suspects are the other players.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Andy Lee is joined in the studio by Mike Goldstein, Abbie Chatfield, Luke McGregor and a panel of 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: The Blind Auditions feature 7 more talented singers, including Natalie, an experienced singer back again in hopes of turning a chair, and 16-year-old Annie, who plans on rocking the stage.

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Bigsies And Littles
programme.desc: Two penguins, Big Blue & Little Blue, explore everyday life with curiosity, kindness, and song, finding big meaning in little moments.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Mischief In Sherwood
programme.desc: Sherwood is in danger from the tyrannical Prince John! Teenage Robin and his merry band of outlaws fight back.

programme.title: Smarty Pants
programme.desc: Tired of being the "losers" in class, three buddies are on a mission to become cool - realising along the way that just accepting themselves is the coolest way to be.

programme.title: Ninjago Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When two evil brothers manipulate the past and future to control all of Ninjago, the ninjas must retrieve the lost time blades to stop them.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Four beybladers and their genius friend travel the world as team 'Bladebreakers' to win a championship, realising there's much more at stake on the go.

programme.title: Transformers: Earthspark
programme.desc: After the end of the Transformers' war, the Malto family moves to Witwicky, Pennsylvania, to start a new life but their lives soon get entangled with a group of Terran Transformers.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: A marriage proposal threatens Fran's future with the Sheffields. S1 E21

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: Mālō e lelei & Kia Orana! We are back at ASB Polyfest - join us for the MAFANA vibes on the Tongan stage and drums from Cook Islands - your one stop wonder is here, lesgooo!!

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Izzy's legacy looms.

programme.title: School Spirits
programme.desc: With an unexpected suspect possibly involved in her death, Maddie’s forced to reveal more about the depth of that relationship - leading to unexpected consequences. S1 E3

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Dave is a firefighter and avid cyclist whose bump gets in the way of wearing various helmets; Bree empowers others on social media by accepting her own psoriasis.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: While the DMV crew awaits payday, everyone scrambles for side gigs; Colette and Ceci attempt to pull Barb out of a pyramid scheme that quickly proves more alluring than any of them anticipated. S1 E14

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the opening match of Round 7 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Steel host the Magic from the Edgar Centre in Dunedin.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Sheldon records the final instalment of "Fun with Flags", Bernadette is shocked to learn of her co-workers' true feelings from Penny. S8 E10

programme.title: Netball
programme.desc: Live coverage of the second match of Round 7 in the 2026 ANZ Premiership season as the Stars take on the Tactix from Pulman Arena in Auckland.

programme.title: Minority Report
programme.desc: In a future where a special police unit is able to arrest murderers before they commit their crimes, an officer from that unit is himself accused of a future murder. Starring Tom Cruise. (2002).

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Armando Iannucci causes shock with an ostrich and Joanna Page whispers about guinea pigs.

programme.title: American Princess
programme.desc: Amanda has surprise visitors who struggle with the hyper-sexuality on display at the Renaissance Festival. Brian develops a crush and Maggie leads a Royal Pub Crawl. S1 E4

programme.title: Fight Night: The Million Dollar Heist
programme.desc: Detective Hudson sees the toll that heist has taken on the community. Meanwhile, Chicken Man struggles to prove his innocence while the Black Mafia plots for revenge. S1 E4

programme.title: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: Rose faces a defining test as a Guardian. Victor offers Lissa a chance to improve the Dominion - but with a shocking catch. S1 E4

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: Luce suspects Howson is controlling their memories and steals photos of her and others undergoing medical procedures; while on a hike, Howson learns of Cassie's attack. S1 E3

programme.title: Fresh
programme.desc: Mālō e lelei & Kia Orana! We are back at ASB Polyfest - join us for the MAFANA vibes on the Tongan stage and drums from Cook Islands - your one stop wonder is here, lesgooo!!

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: This New Zealand-made animation sees the Tākaro Tribe on a learning adventure in Te Wao Arapū (the magical Alphabet Forest), along with Pāpā Rākau (Tree father) and Kōkā (Pond Mother).

programme.title: Mecha Builders
programme.desc: Elmo, Cookie Monster, and Abby Cadabby are robot heroes-in-training who use their STEM superpowers to solve wacky larger-than-life problems.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Meet Bluey, an inexhaustible six-year-old Blue Heeler dog who loves to play. She turns everyday family life into extraordinary adventures!

programme.title: What Will I Be Today?
programme.desc: Join your new friends Kauri, Esera and Wing Gai as they go on imaginative adventures to solve every day problems.

programme.title: Bird's Eye View
programme.desc: After watching a children's Space-themed birthday party the junior birds devise a plan to launch themselves into the great unknown.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir
programme.desc: Marinette and Adrien look like regular teenagers, usually. But together they are Ladybug and Cat Noir, the heroes that protect Paris from the evil Hawk Moth!

programme.title: Animaniacs
programme.desc: They're back! The Warner brothers, Yakko and Wakko, and the Warner sister Dot — three inseparable, irascible siblings — have a great time wreaking havoc and mayhem in the lives of everyone they me

programme.title: Island of Mystery
programme.desc: Josh and his dog crash back 700 years in time, to a mysterious land where taniwhas roam and ancient warriors rule.

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: They're young, passionate and all putting in the hard yards to become NZ's best young riders. Follow the group of friends and their horses throughout the competition season.

programme.title: What Now?
programme.desc: Come and join the party! Catch Aashma, Imy, Manu and Rahil for gunge, cream pies, challenges, prizes and adventures across Aotearoa! Haere mai ki te whare o te hūwareware!

programme.title: Tipua
programme.desc: Ārepa feels betrayed by those around her. Rōhana is cyber stalking her, her mother is cutting off her financial support and everyone except India thinks she shouldn’t be going to Antarctica.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Season Finale: Trouble arises when Fran and Grace enter a mother-daughter beauty contest. S1 E22

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: Michael Bublé, Snoop Dogg, Niall Horan and Reba McEntire each pair two artists to perform solo against each other, then select a winner to move on to the playoffs.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie and Levi bet on their baby’s gender. Alf feels persecuted. Richie oversteps.
